title: Create: Expanded Schedule Window
description: Configurable height + draggable scrollbar for effortless schedule browsing.
body:
# Create: Expanded Schedule Window

A Minecraft **NeoForge client-side mod** that expands the schedule window UI for the [Create](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create) mod,
giving you a better overview of train schedules.

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vZAlHFOj/images/182a7a1478755b2a91a2bd710039197b381d3d7d.png)

## Features

- **Expanded window** — increases the schedule window height by 50px (configurable 0–200px) to show more station entries at a glance
- **Draggable scrollbar** — semi-transparent slider you can drag for fast list navigation

![schedule ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vZAlHFOj/images/4b6264ff71c014437a45dfb1e72b433197919e22.png)

## Configuration

After first launch, edit `config/createexpandedschedule-client.toml`:

```toml
[general]
# Extra height in steps of 10px (0–20, default 5 = 50px)
extraHeight = 5
```

You can also change it in-game via **Mods → Create: Expanded Schedule Window → Config**.
